query:
WITH bins AS (
  SELECT generate_series(0, $1 - 1) AS bin
)
SELECT
  b.bin as bin_id,
  b.bin * $2 + 1    AS bin_min_rank,
  (b.bin + 1) * $2 AS bin_max_rank,
  COUNT(case when not $3 or w.domain not like '%.co.uk' then 1 end)     AS count
FROM bins b
LEFT JOIN whitelist w
  ON FLOOR(w.rank / $2) = b.bin
GROUP BY b.bin
ORDER BY b.bin;
